title: Retro Blockbuster Character Swap
description: Recreate painted blockbuster poster language from the 1980s and 1990s with alternate IP casts, preserving airbrushed energy, montage structure, and theatrical hype.

en.title: Retro Blockbuster Character Swap
en.description: Recreate painted blockbuster poster language from the 1980s and 1990s with alternate IP casts, preserving airbrushed energy, montage structure, and theatrical hype.

zh-CN.title: 复古大片海报角色互换
zh-CN.description: 重做 80s / 90s 手绘大片海报的爆炸云、人物 montage 和夸张标题，但把角色世界换成别的影视或动漫 IP。
